description: Every routing report must ship a local-first fallback with visible limits.

required_elements.statement: Markdown-first instructions that need no remote runtime.
Reference the repo-local scripts that run the task and validators.
If the route uses gh/CLI, include the path that works when auth fails (local validators + Markdown PR body).
State that local files, workspace state, and secrets stay local.
List every Dato requerido and validation pending marker.

rules: The fallback is non-optional; a report without it fails.
Degrade gracefully: prefer Markdown + repo-local scripts over asserting unverified runtime behavior.
Never move secrets outside their local boundary to satisfy a fallback.
